message.content:
Thoroughly explore the CitedBy.ai project structure. I need to understand:
1. The full project tree (focus on src/ directory)
2. The content of package.json (dependencies)
3. The content of vite.config.ts
4. The content of index.html
5. The content of vercel.json (if exists)
6. The content of App.tsx
7. The content of any layout components (AppShell, TopNav, Sidebar)
8. Check if react-router-dom and date-fns are actually imported anywhere
9. Check where jspdf and html2canvas are imported
10. Check where recharts is imported

Search the entire working directory for the project. It might be in C:\Users\User or a subdirectory.

1→// components/layout/Sidebar.tsx
     2→// Sidebar contextuelle — style Raycast (dense, scannable, icônes fines)
     3→// Desktop : fixe sous la TopNav (top-14)
     4→// Mobile  : hamburger + overlay plein écran (sections + sous-items)
     5→
     6→import React, { useState } from 'react';
     7→import {
     8→  PlusCircle, BarChart3, Zap, RefreshCw, Clock,
     9→  Activity, Radio, Brain, MonitorCheck, Bell,
    10→  Sparkles, BookOpen, PenTool, MessageSquare, Shield, AlertTriangle,

    13→  User, CreditCard, Coins, LayoutGrid, Link, Key,

    16→import { SECTIONS } from './TopNav';
    17→
    18→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    19→// TYPES
    20→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    21→
    22→interface SidebarItem {
    23→  type: 'link';
    24→  id: string;
    25→  label: string;
    26→  icon: React.ElementType;
    27→  badge?: string;
    28→  badgeColor?: string;
    29→}
    30→
    31→interface SidebarSeparator {
    32→  type: 'separator';
    33→  label: string;
    34→}
    35→
    36→type SidebarEntry = SidebarItem | SidebarSeparator;
    37→
    38→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    39→// MAPPING SECTION → SOUS-ITEMS (SOURCE DE VÉRITÉ)
    40→// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    41→
    42→const SIDEBAR_ITEMS: Record<string, SidebarEntry[]> = {
    43→

    45→

   143→  onLogoClick,
   144→}: SidebarProps) {

   146→  const items = SIDEBAR_ITEMS[section];
   147→  const resolved = resolveActivePage(activePage);

Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me compile a comprehensive report. ## CitedBy.ai Project Structure - Complete Exploration Report ### Project Location **Path:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\` This is a hybrid Next.js + Vite React SPA project combining a frontend Vite application with a Next.js backend. --- ## 1. Full Project Tree (Excluding node_modules, .next, dist) The project structure is: ``` citedby-ai/ ├── index.html # Vite SPA entry ├── index.tsx # React DOM mount point ├── App.tsx # Main app routing (custom, NOT React Router) ├── types.ts # Core TypeScript types ├── globals.css # Global Tailwind CSS ├── vite.config.ts # Vite configuration ├── vercel.json # Deployment config ├── next.config.mjs # Next.js config (backend) ├── package.json # Dependencies ├── tailwind.config.ts # Tailwind theming ├── tsconfig.json # TypeScript config │ ├── pages/ # 38 page components (33 lazy-loaded) │ ├── Home.tsx, Login.tsx, Analyze.tsx (direct imports) │ ├── Dashboard.tsx, Results.tsx, Account.tsx, Plan.tsx │ ├── AiMonitoring.tsx, Integrations.tsx, ApiDeveloper.tsx (NEW) │ ├── GenerativeTools.tsx, SMCStudio.tsx, ContentWriter.tsx │ ├── SchemaOrg.tsx, RobotsTxt.tsx, SourceOfTruth.tsx │ ├── BotTracking.tsx, Reputation.tsx, EeatBuilder.tsx │ └── ... (38 files total) │ ├── components/ # 15 components │ ├── layout/ │ │ ├── AppShell.tsx # Main container │ │ ├── TopNav.tsx # Top navigation (7 sections) │ │ ├── Sidebar.tsx # Contextual sidebar │ │ └── PageHeader.tsx # Page headers │ ├── dashboard/ # Dashboard-specific components │ │ ├── HeroWelcome.tsx │ │ ├── StatsOverview.tsx │ │ ├── QuickActions.tsx │ │ └── DualModelExplainer.tsx │ ├── ui/ # UI primitives │ │ ├── Badge.tsx, Button.tsx, Card.tsx, Skeleton.tsx, Tooltip.tsx │ ├── CommandPalette.tsx # Cmd+K command palette │ ├── ToastSystem.tsx # Toast notifications │ ├── OnboardingModal.tsx # Welcome modal │ ├── ShortcutsModal.tsx # Keyboard shortcuts modal │ ├── StripeCheckout.tsx # Payment interface │ ├── CategoryCard.tsx, RecommendationCard.tsx, ScoreRing.tsx │ └── ... (15 files total) │ ├── services/ # 20+ business logic services │ ├── analyzer.ts # Core URL analysis │ ├── database.ts # Local IndexedDB wrapper │ ├── criteria.ts # Scoring criteria │ ├── generator.ts # Content generation │ ├── mega-generator.ts # Batch generation │ ├── ai-monitoring.ts # AI monitoring logic │ ├── ai-citation-simulator.ts # Citation simulator │ ├── answer-first-audit.ts # Answer-First audit │ ├── content_writer.ts # Content generation │ ├── schema_service.ts # Schema.org generation │ ├── robots_service.ts # Robots.txt generation │ ├── smc.ts # SMC Studio logic │ ├── reputation_service.ts # Reputation analysis │ ├── api-developer.ts # API key management │ ├── integrations.ts # Integration configs │ ├── scheduling.ts # Scan scheduling │ ├── retargeting.ts # Retargeting opportunities │ ├── ai-response-layer/ # (6 files) AI response generation │ │ ├── index.ts, prompts.ts, hub-generator.ts │ │ └── query-page-generator.ts, recommend-json-generator.ts, sitemap-ai-generator.ts │ └── eeat/ # (8 files) E-E-A-T builder │ ├── index.ts, eeat-auditor.ts, credentials-generator.ts │ ├── about-page-generator.ts, author-bio-generator.ts │ └── citation-block-generator.ts, trust-signals-generator.ts, prompts.ts │ ├── types/ # TypeScript type definitions (7 files) │ ├── ai-monitoring.ts │ ├── ai-response-layer.ts │ ├── api-developer.ts │ ├── eeat.ts │ ├── integrations.ts │ ├── retargeting.ts │ └── scheduling.ts │ ├── lib/ # Utilities │ ├── ai-provider.ts # Google Gemini wrapper │ ├── ai-proxy.ts # API proxy logic │ ├── scoring.ts # Score calculation │ ├── stripe.ts # Stripe utilities │ ├── utils.ts # General utilities │ ├── logger.ts # Logging │ └── supabase/ # Supabase client │ ├── client.ts, server.ts, middleware.ts │ ├── config/ # Configuration files │ ├── engines.ts # AI engine configs │ ├── engine-weights.ts # Scoring weights │ ├── engine-citation-criteria.ts │ └── credit-costs.ts # Pricing config │ ├── i18n/ # Internationalization (FR/EN/ES) │ ├── supabase/ # Backend (Next.js functions + SQL migrations) │ ├── functions/ # 11 Edge Functions │ │ ├── ai-proxy, analyze, auto-recharge, create-checkout │ │ ├── customer-portal, distribute, ingest, notify │ │ ├── reset-quotas, scan-now, stripe-webhook │ └── migrations/ # 8 SQL migrations │ ├── src/ # Additional Next.js/backend code │ ├── App.tsx, components/, hooks/, lib/, pages/, stores/, utils/ │ ├── app/ # Next.js App Router (backend) ├── lib/ # Next.js lib utilities ├── middleware.ts # Next.js middleware ├── next.config.mjs # Next.js config │ ├── scripts/ # PowerShell deployment scripts ├── docs/ # Documentation ├── tests/ # Test files (Vitest) ├── qa/ # QA screenshots and reports └── n8n/ # N8N workflows ``` --- ## 2. Package.json Dependencies **Location:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\package.json` ### Core Dependencies: - `react@^18` - UI framework - `react-dom@^18` - React DOM rendering - `next@^14.2.35` - Full-stack framework - `vite@^7.3.1` - Build tool (for SPA) ### AI & APIs: - `@google/genai@^0.14.1` - Google Gemini API - `stripe@^15.6.0` - Payment processing ### UI & Styling: - `tailwindcss@^3.4.1` - CSS framework - `lucide-react@^0.378.0` - Icon library - `clsx@^2.1.1` - Conditional styling - `tailwind-merge@^2.3.0` - Tailwind merging ### Authentication & Database: - `@supabase/supabase-js@^2.43.4` - Supabase client - `@supabase/ssr@^0.3.0` - Server-side auth ### Forms & Validation: - `react-hook-form@^7.51.4` - Form management - `@hookform/resolvers@^3.4.0` - Form validation adapters - `zod@^3.23.8` - Schema validation ### Document Export: - `jspdf@^4.1.0` - PDF generation - `html2canvas@^1.4.1` - HTML to canvas conversion ### Charts & Data Visualization: - `recharts@^2.12.7` - React chart library ### Routing: - `react-router-dom@^6.30.1` - Client-side routing ### Date/Time: - `date-fns@^3.6.0` - Date utilities ### Notifications: - `sonner@^1.4.41` - Toast notifications ### Dev Dependencies: - `vitest@^4.0.18` - Unit testing - `@vitejs/plugin-react@^5.1.4` - Vite React plugin - `@testing-library/react@^16.3.2` - React testing utilities - `typescript@^5` - TypeScript compiler - `eslint@^8`, `eslint-config-next` - Linting - `autoprefixer@^10.4.24`, `postcss@^8` - CSS processing - `jsdom@^28.0.0` - DOM implementation for tests --- ## 3. vite.config.ts **Location:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\vite.config.ts` ```typescript /// import { defineConfig } from 'vitest/config'; import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'; export default defineConfig({ plugins: [react()], server: { port: 5173, host: '0.0.0.0', allowedHosts: ['localhost', '.ngrok-free.dev', '.vercel.app'], }, build: { target: 'es2020', chunkSizeWarningLimit: 500, }, test: { globals: true, environment: 'jsdom', setupFiles: './tests/setup.ts', css: true, include: ['tests/**/*.{test,spec}.{ts,tsx}'], }, }); ``` **Key Points:** - Dev server runs on port 5173 - Supports ngrok tunneling for remote development - ES2020 target for modern browser support - Vitest for unit testing with jsdom environment - Chunk size warning threshold: 500KB --- ## 4. index.html **Location:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\index.html` ```html CitedBy.ai — AEO Intelligence Platform
``` **Key Features:** - Vite SPA entry point - French language (`lang="fr"`) - Dark mode class - Fonts: Inter (sans), Playfair Display (serif), Geist (monospace) - Custom scroll progress indicator - No Tailwind CDN (built locally via Vite) --- ## 5. vercel.json **Location:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\vercel.json` ```json { "cleanUrls": true, "rewrites": [{ "source": "/(.*)", "destination": "/index.html" }], "headers": [ { "source": "/(.*)", "headers": [ { "key": "Strict-Transport-Security", "value": "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains" }, { "key": "X-Frame-Options", "value": "DENY" }, { "key": "X-Content-Type-Options", "value": "nosniff" }, { "key": "Referrer-Policy", "value": "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" }, { "key": "Permissions-Policy", "value": "camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(self)" }, { "key": "Content-Security-Policy", "value": "default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co https://api.stripe.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; script-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';" } ] } ] } ``` **Deployment Configuration:** - SPA rewrites all routes to `/index.html` - Security headers: HSTS, clickjacking protection, CORS - CSP allows Supabase, Stripe, and Google APIs - Restricts inline scripts for security --- ## 6. App.tsx Structure **Location:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\App.tsx` (33.7 KB) **Key Components:** ```typescript // Direct imports (fast-loading pages) import Home from './pages/Home'; import Login from './pages/Login'; import Analyze from './pages/Analyze'; // Lazy-loaded pages (33 pages total) const Dashboard = lazy(() => import('./pages/Dashboard')); const Results = lazy(() => import('./pages/Results').then(m => ({ default: m.Results }))); const SMCStudio = lazy(() => import('./pages/SMCStudio')); const AiMonitoring = lazy(() => import('./pages/AiMonitoring')); const Integrations = lazy(() => import('./pages/Integrations')); const ApiDeveloper = lazy(() => import('./pages/ApiDeveloper')); // ... (30 more lazy-loaded pages) // Layout and core components import AppShell from './components/layout/AppShell'; import { Toast, ToastContext, ToastContainer } from './components/ToastSystem'; import CommandPalettePanel from './components/CommandPalette'; import ShortcutsModal from './components/ShortcutsModal'; import OnboardingModal from './components/OnboardingModal'; ``` **Architecture:** - **Custom 2-level routing** (NOT React Router DOM) - Level 1: 7 sections (Dashboard, Analyse, Citations, Outils, Technique, Marketplace, Compte) - Level 2: Pages within each section - **State management:** - `currentView` - current page - `activeSection` - active section - `analysisData` - analysis result state - `history` - stored analyses - `megaStatus` - generation status - Libraries: smcLibrary, truthLibrary, schemaLibrary, robotsLibrary - **Features:** - Toast system (custom implementation) - Command palette (Ctrl+K) - Keyboard shortcuts modal (?) - Onboarding modal - AnimatedNumber hook for smooth transitions --- ## 7. Layout Components ### AppShell.tsx **Location:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\layout\AppShell.tsx` ```typescript export default function AppShell({ activeSection, onSectionChange, activePage, onPageChange, credits, plan, user, onOpenCommandPalette, onLogoClick, children, }: AppShellProps) ``` **Structure:** - **TopNav** (sticky, in-flow) - 7 section tabs + credits display + avatar - **Sidebar** (contextual, in-flow on desktop, overlay on mobile) - **Main content** (flex-1, scrollable) - Max width: 1440px constraint - No fixed positioning (flex layout) ### TopNav.tsx **Location:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\layout\TopNav.tsx` **Features:** - **Logo area** (W-60, aligned with sidebar) - **Section tabs** (7 sections with active state styling) - **Right sidebar:** - Command palette button (Cmd+K) - Credits display with coin icon - User avatar (gradient colored) - **Style:** glassmorphism with `backdrop-blur-xl`, dark theme - **Hidden on mobile** (responsive) **Section mapping:** ```typescript const SECTIONS = [ { id: 'dashboard', label: 'Dashboard' }, { id: 'analyse', label: 'Analyse' }, { id: 'citations', label: 'Citations' }, { id: 'outils', label: 'Outils' }, { id: 'technique', label: 'Technique' }, { id: 'marketplace', label: 'Marketplace' }, { id: 'compte', label: 'Compte' }, ]; ``` ### Sidebar.tsx **Location:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\components\layout\Sidebar.tsx` **Navigation Structure (SIDEBAR_ITEMS):** ``` analyse: ├── Nouvel audit (new-analysis) ├── Résultats d'audit (results) ├── Plan d'action (action-plan) ├── Re-scan & Suivi (rescan) └── Historique (history) citations: ├── Monitoring IA (ai-monitoring) ├── Simulateur citations (ai-citation-simulator) ├── AI Response Layer (ai-response-layer) ├── Tracking Bots IA (bot-tracking) ├── Alertes AEO (alerts-aeo) └── Citations par langue (multilingual) outils: ├── AEO Studio (smc-studio) ├── Blog Optimizer (blog-optimizer) ├── Rédacteur IA (content-writer) ├── Answer First Audit (answer-first) ├── E-E-A-T Builder (eeat-builder) └── Réputation (reputation) technique: ├── Schema.org (schema-org) ├── Robots.txt (robots-txt) ├── Source of Truth (source-of-truth) └── LLMs.txt Generator (llms-txt) marketplace: ├── Trouver publishers (publisher-search) ├── Annuaire (directory) ├── Clients (clients) ├── Messages (messages) └── Commandes (mission-orders) compte: ├── Mon compte (account) ├── Abonnement (plan) ├── Recharger crédits (recharge) ├── Projets (projects) ├── Intégrations (integrations) ├── API Développeur (api-developer) └── Affiliation (affiliation) ``` **Features:** - Raycast-style dense, scannable design - Desktop: fixed sidebar under TopNav - Mobile: hamburger menu + full-screen overlay - Page aliases for proper highlighting - Icons with badges for special states --- ## 8. React Router DOM Import Analysis **Files importing react-router-dom:** - `src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx` - `src/pages/SectorSelectPage.tsx` - `src/pages/RadarPage.tsx` - `src/pages/ProspectDetailPage.tsx` - `src/pages/PipelinePage.tsx` - `src/pages/AuthPage.tsx` - `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx` - `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx` - `src/main.tsx` - `src/App.tsx` **Important:** React Router DOM is used in the `src/` directory (Next.js backend related code), NOT in the main SPA routing which uses custom 2-level routing in `App.tsx`. The main frontend uses a custom routing system. --- ## 9. Date-fns Import Analysis **Result:** **NO FILES IMPORT date-fns** Despite `date-fns@^3.6.0` being in dependencies, it is **NOT actively used** in the codebase. The project likely relies on native JavaScript Date methods or other date handling approaches. --- ## 10. jsPDF & html2canvas Import Analysis **Files using jsPDF and html2canvas:** 1. **pages/Results.tsx** (Both) - Uses `html2canvas` to capture HTML element as canvas - Uses `jsPDF` to generate PDF from canvas - For audit report PDF export functionality 2. **pages/Recharge.tsx** (jsPDF) - Likely for invoice/receipt generation 3. **pages/Plan.tsx** (jsPDF) - Likely for subscription confirmation PDF 4. **pages/Account.tsx** (jsPDF) - Likely for account-related PDFs **Usage Pattern (Results.tsx):** ```typescript import html2canvas from 'html2canvas'; import jsPDF from 'jspdf'; const handleDownloadPDF = async () => { const element = document.getElementById('full-pdf-report'); const canvas = await html2canvas(element, { scale: 2, useCORS: true, logging: false, windowWidth: 1000 }); const imgData = canvas.toDataURL('image/jpeg', 0.95); const pdf = new jsPDF({ orientation: 'portrait', unit: 'mm', format: 'a4' }); // ... add images to PDF }; ``` --- ## 11. Recharts Import Analysis **Files using recharts:** 1. **pages/BotTracking.tsx** - Tracking visualization 2. **pages/Integrations.tsx** - Analytics dashboard charts 3. **pages/EeatBuilder.tsx** - E-E-A-T metrics visualization 4. **pages/ApiDeveloper.tsx** - API usage analytics 5. **pages/AnalyticsIntegrations.tsx** - Analytics integration dashboards 6. **pages/AiMonitoring.tsx** - Monitoring trend charts (AreaChart, BarChart, etc.) **Imported Components:** ```typescript import { AreaChart, Area, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer, BarChart, Bar, Cell, Legend } from 'recharts'; ``` **Usage:** Recharts is actively used for data visualization across the analytics and monitoring pages. --- ## Summary Table | Aspect | Details | |--------|---------| | **Technology Stack** | React 18 + Vite SPA + Next.js Backend | | **Total Pages** | 38 (3 direct imports, 33 lazy-loaded) | | **Components** | 15 primary + UI primitives | | **Services** | 20+ business logic modules | | **Type Definitions** | 7 custom type files | | **Routing** | Custom 2-level routing (NOT React Router) | | **State Management** | React Context (Toast, Analysis, History) | | **Styling** | Tailwind CSS + dark theme | | **PDF Export** | jsPDF + html2canvas | | **Charts** | Recharts (6 pages) | | **Date Handling** | No active date-fns usage (dependency unused) | | **React Router** | Present in `src/` backend code only | | **AI Provider** | Google Gemini (@google/genai) | | **Authentication** | Supabase Auth | | **Payments** | Stripe integration | | **Deployment** | Vercel with SPA rewrites | --- **Project Location:** `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\` This comprehensive exploration reveals a well-structured, modern full-stack application with clear separation between frontend SPA (Vite/React) and backend services (Next.js/Supabase), with a sophisticated 2-level navigation system and rich feature set including AI monitoring, content generation, and document export capabilities.
